instruction: 오지호과(와) 연결된 네트워크 흔적(vt_ip)을 조회해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '10589600'}) RETURN t $$) AS (t agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '조민수'})-[:has_account]->(b:vt_bacnt) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '110-234-699762'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

instruction: 특정 IP '199.8.220.88'를 할당받아 쓴 사람을 확인해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '199.8.220.88' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: 발신 번호 '070-6627-4752'의 통화 방향 경로를 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '070-6627-4752'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2026-3711'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

instruction: 피의자 용의자A93과 홍길동가 어떤 관계망으로 연결되어 있는지 최단경로 함수로 파악해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '용의자A93'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '홍길동'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '10353700'}) RETURN t $$) AS (t agtype);

instruction: 사건번호 CASE-2025-8563와 관련된 인물들을 모조리 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2025-8563'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_call) WHERE c->>'duration' = '1481' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);

instruction: 전화번호 '070-5051-2296'에서 발신(caller)되어 수신자(callee)에게 도달한 통화 기록(vt_call)을 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '070-5051-2296'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

instruction: 'CASE-2025-4602' 사건의 피의자 및 피해자(vt_psn) 목록을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2025-4602'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '장도연'})-[:has_account]->(b:vt_bacnt) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '010-3180-6256'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '류준열'})-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: 계좌 '005-144-554093'에서 나간(from_account) 이체(vt_transfer) 내역과 목적지 계좌(to_account) 경로를 정리해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '005-144-554093'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

instruction: 발신 번호 '010-4964-8585'의 통화 방향 경로를 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '010-4964-8585'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b:vt_bacnt {actno: '3333-139-583090'})-[:has_account]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

instruction: 발신 번호 '070-6331-8896'의 통화 방향 경로를 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '070-6331-8896'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer) WHERE (t->>'amount')::int >= 1995900 RETURN t, t->>'amount' AS amount $$) AS (t agtype, amount agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '010-1211-3885'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

instruction: 송금액이 5581400을 넘는 계좌 이체(vt_transfer) 기록을 전부 조회해줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer) WHERE (t->>'amount')::int >= 5581400 RETURN t, t->>'amount' AS amount $$) AS (t agtype, amount agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '200-677-459277'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_call) WHERE c->>'duration' = '2182' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);

instruction: 특정 IP '19.34.78.17'를 할당받아 쓴 사람을 확인해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '19.34.78.17' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: 'CASE-2025-1029' 사건의 피의자 및 피해자(vt_psn) 목록을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2025-1029'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

instruction: 계좌 '3333-436-228450'에서 출발하여 다른 계좌로 자금이 넘어간 이력을 추적해라.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '임시완'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '안보현'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

instruction: 계좌 '200-304-798586'에서 나간(from_account) 이체(vt_transfer) 내역과 목적지 계좌(to_account) 경로를 정리해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '02-1145-1677'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

instruction: 숫자 50042200 이상으로 자금이 움직인(amount) 이체내역을 추적해라.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer) WHERE (t->>'amount')::int >= 50042200 RETURN t, t->>'amount' AS amount $$) AS (t agtype, amount agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2026-6357'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '070-8397-7557'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '황정민'})-[:has_account]->(b:vt_bacnt) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

instruction: 전지현과(와) 인물 '송중기78'(이름대신) 사이의 엮인 최단 경로(Shortest Path)를 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '전지현'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '송중기78'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_call) WHERE c->>'duration' = '3281' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);

instruction: 사건번호 CASE-2026-9958와 관련된 인물들을 모조리 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2026-9958'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

instruction: 계좌 '3333-228-957451'에서 나간(from_account) 이체(vt_transfer) 내역과 목적지 계좌(to_account) 경로를 정리해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '3333-228-957451'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

instruction: 숫자 93900 이상으로 자금이 움직인(amount) 이체내역을 추적해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer) WHERE (t->>'amount')::int >= 93900 RETURN t, t->>'amount' AS amount $$) AS (t agtype, amount agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '강하늘24'})-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: 출금 계좌가 '005-990-763113'인 자금의 전체 이체 흐름을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '005-990-763113'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

instruction: 용의자A46이 소유한 계좌들을 리스트업해라.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '용의자A46'})-[:has_account]->(b:vt_bacnt) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '151.27.200.172' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: 수사 대상자 류준열34에서 시작해서 홍길동로 향하는 연결망 최단 경로를 추출해줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '777-323-544922'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_call) WHERE c->>'duration' = '124' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '110-374-507982'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '200-624-550969'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '참고인B43'})-[:has_account]->(b:vt_bacnt) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '005-380-464966'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '070-6233-8438'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

instruction: '137.27.220.197' IP로 접속한 기록이 있는 수사 대상자(vt_psn)를 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '137.27.220.197' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '전지현'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '피해자2'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

instruction: 출금 계좌가 '3333-974-670566'인 자금의 전체 이체 흐름을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '3333-974-670566'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b:vt_bacnt {actno: '200-567-927435'})-[:has_account]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '조민수'})-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: duration 값이 '1422'인 통화(vt_call) 내역을 검색해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_call) WHERE c->>'duration' = '1422' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);

instruction: 계좌 '110-308-117526'에서 출발하여 다른 계좌로 자금이 넘어간 이력을 추적해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '110-308-117526'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '서강준31'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '피해자2'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

instruction: 특정 IP '189.43.217.3'를 할당받아 쓴 사람을 확인해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '189.43.217.3' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '02-5816-3888'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

instruction: 피의자 임시완12과 류준열가 어떤 관계망으로 연결되어 있는지 최단경로 함수로 파악해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '임시완12'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '류준열'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b:vt_bacnt {actno: '005-257-171730'})-[:has_account]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

instruction: duration 값이 '2562'인 통화(vt_call) 내역을 검색해라.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_call) WHERE c->>'duration' = '2562' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '005-859-543090'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer) WHERE (t->>'amount')::int >= 10796600 RETURN t, t->>'amount' AS amount $$) AS (t agtype, amount agtype);

instruction: '721900'원의 자금이 이동된 이체내역을 조회해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '721900'}) RETURN t $$) AS (t agtype);

instruction: '010-7812-8559' 번호가 건 전화 기록을 통화내역(vt_call)에서 추적해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '010-7812-8559'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

instruction: '153.158.214.110' IP로 접속한 기록이 있는 수사 대상자(vt_psn)를 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '153.158.214.110' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '피해자24'})-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: 출금 계좌가 '005-244-352499'인 자금의 전체 이체 흐름을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '005-244-352499'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_call) WHERE c->>'duration' = '2661' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '임시완39'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '장도연'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

instruction: 송금액이 10174100을 넘는 계좌 이체(vt_transfer) 기록을 전부 조회해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer) WHERE (t->>'amount')::int >= 10174100 RETURN t, t->>'amount' AS amount $$) AS (t agtype, amount agtype);

instruction: 출금 계좌가 '005-635-149543'인 자금의 전체 이체 흐름을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '005-635-149543'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b:vt_bacnt {actno: '200-300-551018'})-[:has_account]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

instruction: 계좌 '3333-545-136726'에서 출발하여 다른 계좌로 자금이 넘어간 이력을 추적해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '3333-545-136726'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '5178600'}) RETURN t $$) AS (t agtype);

instruction: 전화번호 '010-8434-3840'에서 발신(caller)되어 수신자(callee)에게 도달한 통화 기록(vt_call)을 찾아줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '010-8434-3840'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

instruction: 수사 대상자 조민수에서 시작해서 최서연로 향하는 연결망 최단 경로를 추출해줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '송중기58'})-[:has_account]->(b:vt_bacnt) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

instruction: duration 값이 '193'인 통화(vt_call) 내역을 검색해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_call) WHERE c->>'duration' = '193' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);

instruction: IP 주소(ip_addr)가 '25.146.182.248'인 IP(vt_ip)를 사용한(used_ip) 인물들을 추출해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '25.146.182.248' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: 숫자 783000 이상으로 자금이 움직인(amount) 이체내역을 추적해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer) WHERE (t->>'amount')::int >= 783000 RETURN t, t->>'amount' AS amount $$) AS (t agtype, amount agtype);

instruction: 발신 번호 '010-7170-1442'의 통화 방향 경로를 보여줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '010-7170-1442'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '피해자132'})-[:has_account]->(b:vt_bacnt) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

instruction: 계좌 '777-967-436189'에서 나간(from_account) 이체(vt_transfer) 내역과 목적지 계좌(to_account) 경로를 정리해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '777-967-436189'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

instruction: 정확히 '503800'만큼 이체된(transfer) 내역을 검색해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '503800'}) RETURN t $$) AS (t agtype);

instruction: '156.139.8.82' IP로 접속한 기록이 있는 수사 대상자(vt_psn)를 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '156.139.8.82' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: 피의자 안보현과 피해자1가 어떤 관계망으로 연결되어 있는지 최단경로 함수로 파악해라.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '안보현'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '피해자1'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '87.172.249.198' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer) WHERE (t->>'amount')::int >= 603300 RETURN t, t->>'amount' AS amount $$) AS (t agtype, amount agtype);

instruction: 강하늘18이(가) 보유하고 있는(has_account) 계좌(vt_bacnt) 목록을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '강하늘18'})-[:has_account]->(b:vt_bacnt) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

instruction: 'CASE-2024-4953' 사건의 피의자 및 피해자(vt_psn) 목록을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2024-4953'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

instruction: 출금 계좌가 '005-658-305442'인 자금의 전체 이체 흐름을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '005-658-305442'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

instruction: 전화번호 '070-2300-5202'에서 발신(caller)되어 수신자(callee)에게 도달한 통화 기록(vt_call)을 찾아줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_call) WHERE c->>'duration' = '156' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);

instruction: 발신 번호 '010-6885-3147'의 통화 방향 경로를 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '010-6885-3147'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

instruction: 수사 대상자 홍길동에서 시작해서 전지현로 향하는 연결망 최단 경로를 추출해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '홍길동'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '전지현'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

instruction: 'CASE-2026-7418' 사건의 피의자 및 피해자(vt_psn) 목록을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2026-7418'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

instruction: '90.40.140.69' IP로 접속한 기록이 있는 수사 대상자(vt_psn)를 찾아줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '90.40.140.69' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '54.134.250.236' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: 통화시간(duration)이 문자열 '2160'인 통화내역(vt_call)을 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_call) WHERE c->>'duration' = '2160' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);

instruction: 장도연과(와) 인물 '정지훈'(이름대신) 사이의 엮인 최단 경로(Shortest Path)를 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '장도연'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '정지훈'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

instruction: 계좌 '110-574-824491'에서 출발하여 다른 계좌로 자금이 넘어간 이력을 추적해라.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '피해자1'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '황정민'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

instruction: 숫자 5443800 이상으로 자금이 움직인(amount) 이체내역을 추적해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer) WHERE (t->>'amount')::int >= 5443800 RETURN t, t->>'amount' AS amount $$) AS (t agtype, amount agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '070-5073-4369'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

instruction: 출금 계좌가 '005-609-961874'인 자금의 전체 이체 흐름을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '005-609-961874'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

instruction: 홍길동과(와) 인물 '안보현48'(이름대신) 사이의 엮인 최단 경로(Shortest Path)를 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '홍길동'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '안보현48'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

instruction: 계좌 '110-476-557075'에서 나간(from_account) 이체(vt_transfer) 내역과 목적지 계좌(to_account) 경로를 정리해줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '142.223.121.242' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: 사건번호 CASE-2024-3141와 관련된 인물들을 모조리 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2024-3141'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

instruction: '070-5599-2122' 번호가 건 전화 기록을 통화내역(vt_call)에서 추적해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '070-5599-2122'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

instruction: 출금 계좌가 '3333-724-258177'인 자금의 전체 이체 흐름을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '3333-724-258177'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b:vt_bacnt {actno: '777-247-852922'})-[:has_account]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

instruction: 'CASE-2026-7615' 사건의 피의자 및 피해자(vt_psn) 목록을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2026-7615'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

instruction: 통화시간(duration)이 문자열 '341'인 통화내역(vt_call)을 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_call) WHERE c->>'duration' = '341' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);

instruction: 계좌 '777-908-872368'에서 출발하여 다른 계좌로 자금이 넘어간 이력을 추적해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '777-908-872368'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b:vt_bacnt {actno: '110-194-216711'})-[:has_account]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

instruction: 이체 금액(amount)이 164400원 이상(>=)인 초대형 이체 내역(vt_transfer)을 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer) WHERE (t->>'amount')::int >= 164400 RETURN t, t->>'amount' AS amount $$) AS (t agtype, amount agtype);

instruction: IP 주소(ip_addr)가 '31.88.1.198'인 IP(vt_ip)를 사용한(used_ip) 인물들을 추출해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '31.88.1.198' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: 피해자2과(와) 인물 '권유리'(이름대신) 사이의 엮인 최단 경로(Shortest Path)를 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '피해자2'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '권유리'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '105.31.100.98' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: 'CASE-2026-5109' 사건의 피의자 및 피해자(vt_psn) 목록을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2026-5109'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

instruction: 통화시간(duration)이 문자열 '1103'인 통화내역(vt_call)을 찾아줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_call) WHERE c->>'duration' = '1103' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);

instruction: 피의자 송중기79과 피의자1가 어떤 관계망으로 연결되어 있는지 최단경로 함수로 파악해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '송중기79'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '피의자1'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '서강준62'})-[:has_account]->(b:vt_bacnt) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

instruction: 발신 번호 '010-6098-7964'의 통화 방향 경로를 보여줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '010-6098-7964'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '110-564-618928'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

instruction: 사건번호 CASE-2025-7787와 관련된 인물들을 모조리 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2025-7787'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

instruction: 최서연65과(와) 인물 '대포통장주'(이름대신) 사이의 엮인 최단 경로(Shortest Path)를 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '최서연65'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '대포통장주'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '신세경49'})-[:has_account]->(b:vt_bacnt) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_call) WHERE c->>'duration' = '3290' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);

instruction: 특정 IP '186.192.132.66'를 할당받아 쓴 사람을 확인해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '186.192.132.66' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: 정확히 '2561'초 동안 지속된 전화 통화 기록을 보여줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_call) WHERE c->>'duration' = '2561' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);

instruction: 전화번호 '070-4626-3802'에서 발신(caller)되어 수신자(callee)에게 도달한 통화 기록(vt_call)을 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '070-4626-3802'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

instruction: 수사 대상자 참고인B에서 시작해서 신세경로 향하는 연결망 최단 경로를 추출해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '참고인B'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '신세경'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '200-133-774821'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_call) WHERE c->>'duration' = '588' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '110-981-804541'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '010-4268-5478'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

instruction: 계좌번호 3333-289-308675에 연결된 인물을 추적해줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b:vt_bacnt {actno: '3333-289-308675'})-[:has_account]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_call) WHERE c->>'duration' = '2522' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '200-531-236229'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

instruction: 금액이 '119800'원인 계좌 이체(vt_transfer) 기록을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '119800'}) RETURN t $$) AS (t agtype);

instruction: '200-881-557753' 계좌의 명의자(vt_psn)를 확인해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b:vt_bacnt {actno: '200-881-557753'})-[:has_account]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

instruction: '070-6287-6177' 번호가 건 전화 기록을 통화내역(vt_call)에서 추적해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '070-6287-6177'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

instruction: 수사 대상자 최서연90에서 시작해서 피해자229로 향하는 연결망 최단 경로를 추출해줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '010-5521-6764'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b:vt_bacnt {actno: '110-592-123525'})-[:has_account]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

instruction: 금액이 '20938300'원인 계좌 이체(vt_transfer) 기록을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '20938300'}) RETURN t $$) AS (t agtype);

instruction: 이체 금액(amount)이 48100원 이상(>=)인 초대형 이체 내역(vt_transfer)을 찾아줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer) WHERE (t->>'amount')::int >= 48100 RETURN t, t->>'amount' AS amount $$) AS (t agtype, amount agtype);

instruction: 계좌 '200-338-230121'에서 나간(from_account) 이체(vt_transfer) 내역과 목적지 계좌(to_account) 경로를 정리해줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '070-3669-7442'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

instruction: 전화번호 '010-4475-2362'에서 발신(caller)되어 수신자(callee)에게 도달한 통화 기록(vt_call)을 찾아줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '010-4475-2362'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2026-1937'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_call) WHERE c->>'duration' = '955' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);

instruction: 금액이 '1014100'원인 계좌 이체(vt_transfer) 기록을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '1014100'}) RETURN t $$) AS (t agtype);

instruction: 은행 계좌 '110-584-401100'의 주인이 누구인지 조회해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b:vt_bacnt {actno: '110-584-401100'})-[:has_account]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

instruction: 피의자 서강준과 장도연가 어떤 관계망으로 연결되어 있는지 최단경로 함수로 파악해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '서강준'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '장도연'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2024-3752'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b:vt_bacnt {actno: '777-414-635467'})-[:has_account]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '940700'}) RETURN t $$) AS (t agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '200-487-660588'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '005-436-792929'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b:vt_bacnt {actno: '777-597-767965'})-[:has_account]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '110-993-784182'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

instruction: 발신 번호 '070-5171-5093'의 통화 방향 경로를 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '070-5171-5093'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

instruction: '114.31.233.10' IP로 접속한 기록이 있는 수사 대상자(vt_psn)를 찾아줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '114.31.233.10' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2024-9534'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '215.214.5.71' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: 송중기45과(와) 연결된 네트워크 흔적(vt_ip)을 조회해라.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '송중기45'})-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: '010-8847-5742' 번호가 건 전화 기록을 통화내역(vt_call)에서 추적해줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '010-8847-5742'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '070-5598-8775'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

instruction: 권유리17과(와) 인물 '피의자1'(이름대신) 사이의 엮인 최단 경로(Shortest Path)를 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '권유리17'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '피의자1'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '010-5189-4508'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '20523300'}) RETURN t $$) AS (t agtype);

instruction: 사건 'CASE-2026-4965'에 연루된(involves) 모든 사람들의 이름(name)을 알고 싶어.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2026-4965'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

instruction: 정확히 '950800'만큼 이체된(transfer) 내역을 검색해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '950800'}) RETURN t $$) AS (t agtype);

instruction: 전화번호 '070-4949-7049'에서 발신(caller)되어 수신자(callee)에게 도달한 통화 기록(vt_call)을 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '070-4949-7049'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '12.202.180.57' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b:vt_bacnt {actno: '3333-343-422672'})-[:has_account]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2026-6790'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

instruction: 피의자 송중기99과 홍길동가 어떤 관계망으로 연결되어 있는지 최단경로 함수로 파악해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '송중기99'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '홍길동'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '005-815-152310'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

instruction: 계좌 '005-350-245154'에서 나간(from_account) 이체(vt_transfer) 내역과 목적지 계좌(to_account) 경로를 정리해줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '안보현'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '황정민'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

instruction: 은행 계좌 '110-368-273659'의 주인이 누구인지 조회해라.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b:vt_bacnt {actno: '110-368-273659'})-[:has_account]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

instruction: 한소희과(와) 인물 '안보현'(이름대신) 사이의 엮인 최단 경로(Shortest Path)를 보여줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '215.54.203.195' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: 발신 번호 '010-1612-8081'의 통화 방향 경로를 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '010-1612-8081'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer) WHERE (t->>'amount')::int >= 1088000 RETURN t, t->>'amount' AS amount $$) AS (t agtype, amount agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '대포통장주'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '안보현60'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

instruction: '183.253.239.166' IP로 접속한 기록이 있는 수사 대상자(vt_psn)를 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '183.253.239.166' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: 계좌 '200-318-577213'에서 출발하여 다른 계좌로 자금이 넘어간 이력을 추적해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '200-318-577213'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '216.42.39.104' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '정지훈80'})-[:owns_phone]->(t:vt_telno) RETURN p, t $$) AS (p agtype, t agtype);

instruction: 'CASE-2025-4211' 사건의 피의자 및 피해자(vt_psn) 목록을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2025-4211'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

instruction: 발신 번호 '070-5580-1169'의 통화 방향 경로를 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '070-5580-1169'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

instruction: 권유리과(와) 인물 '한소희32'(이름대신) 사이의 엮인 최단 경로(Shortest Path)를 보여줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer) WHERE (t->>'amount')::int >= 20514000 RETURN t, t->>'amount' AS amount $$) AS (t agtype, amount agtype);

instruction: 송금액(amount)이 문자열 '50618300'인 이체 내역(vt_transfer)을 찾아줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '50618300'}) RETURN t $$) AS (t agtype);

instruction: '55.242.44.161' IP로 접속한 기록이 있는 수사 대상자(vt_psn)를 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '55.242.44.161' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '피해자252'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '박민준'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

instruction: 금액이 '449500'원인 계좌 이체(vt_transfer) 기록을 보여줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '449500'}) RETURN t $$) AS (t agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '153.225.133.57' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: 'CASE-2026-2426' 사건의 피의자 및 피해자(vt_psn) 목록을 보여줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2026-2426'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

instruction: 계좌번호 '200-132-301736'을 가지고 있는(has_account) 사람을 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b:vt_bacnt {actno: '200-132-301736'})-[:has_account]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

instruction: 피의자 최서연95과 피의자158가 어떤 관계망으로 연결되어 있는지 최단경로 함수로 파악해라.

instruction: 전화번호 '010-1694-1918'에서 발신(caller)되어 수신자(callee)에게 도달한 통화 기록(vt_call)을 찾아줘.

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH path = shortest_path((p1:vt_psn {name: '조민수'})-[*1..5]-(p2:vt_psn {name: '송중기'})) RETURN path $$) AS (path agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '816600'}) RETURN t $$) AS (t agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b:vt_bacnt {actno: '110-644-898637'})-[:has_account]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t1:vt_telno {telno: '02-4921-6346'})<-[:caller]-(c:vt_call)-[:callee]->(t2:vt_telno) RETURN t1, c, t2 $$) AS (t1 agtype, c agtype, t2 agtype);

output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer) WHERE (t->>'amount')::int >= 10347400 RETURN t, t->>'amount' AS amount $$) AS (t agtype, amount agtype);

instruction: '3333-150-195376' 계좌의 명의자(vt_psn)를 확인해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b:vt_bacnt {actno: '3333-150-195376'})-[:has_account]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p, b $$) AS (p agtype, b agtype);

instruction: 정확히 '384600'만큼 이체된(transfer) 내역을 검색해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (t:vt_transfer {amount: '384600'}) RETURN t $$) AS (t agtype);

instruction: 사건번호 CASE-2024-9363와 관련된 인물들을 모조리 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_case {name: 'CASE-2024-9363'})-[:involves]->(p:vt_psn) RETURN p $$) AS (p agtype);

instruction: IP 주소(ip_addr)가 '160.72.183.191'인 IP(vt_ip)를 사용한(used_ip) 인물들을 추출해줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '160.72.183.191' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: 수사 대상자 강하늘에서 시작해서 총책로 향하는 연결망 최단 경로를 추출해줘.

instruction: 계좌 '777-864-194035'에서 출발하여 다른 계좌로 자금이 넘어간 이력을 추적해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (b1:vt_bacnt {actno: '777-864-194035'})-[:from_account]->(t:vt_transfer)-[:to_account]->(b2:vt_bacnt) RETURN b1, t, b2 $$) AS (b1 agtype, t agtype, b2 agtype);

instruction: 특정 IP '108.11.129.38'를 할당받아 쓴 사람을 확인해라.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (p:vt_psn)-[:used_ip]->(i:vt_ip) WHERE i->>'ip_addr' = '108.11.129.38' RETURN p, i $$) AS (p agtype, i agtype);

instruction: 통화시간(duration)이 문자열 '71'인 통화내역(vt_call)을 찾아줘.
input: Translate the natural language forensic question into a valid AgensGraph Cypher query.
output: SELECT * FROM cypher('tccop_graph_v6', $$ MATCH (c:vt_call) WHERE c->>'duration' = '71' RETURN c $$) AS (c agtype);
